Second Prize to Our Students

Our students from the Public Relations and Advertising department, Sena Dik and Ömer Faruk Dişçeken, came in second in the bizz@kampüs competition organized by Ülker!

Our students, who made it to the finals with their new product and communication campaign from among more than a hundred universities and thousands of competitors, won a prize of 55 thousand TL and an internship opportunity at Pladis (Global) brands by making it to the finals.

This year, the 13th competition is held and 3rd and 4th year university students and graduate students are developing marketing-focused strategies for the brand’s different products. The competition, which attracted the interest of students interested in marketing and who want to gain such experience on their way to a professional career, attracted thousands of students and a total of 165 thousand TL in prizes were given to the top 3 teams.
